description: The ButtonValueToggle component can be used to make an IButton that switches a boolean value between ``true`` and ``false`` every time the button is pressed.

fields.TargetValue: The boolean to invert whenever the button is pressed.

usage: To function, the component simply needs to be attached to a slot that also has a button component attached to it. From then on, pressing that button will activate the ButtonToggle, making it toggle its ``TargetValue`` from true to false or the other way round.
